changes.summary: Optional boolean (defaults to true) that controls whether calls can be placed to the group.
Message media settings are now mapped with message-specific read and write logic, including sub_type_settings and service-level fields.
Read and refresh retries when the API returns empty or missing route lists instead of clearing the resource from state.
Exported block labels now use the format Integration-{integration_name} instead of {integration_name}_{credential_name}.
Export now preserves zero-value entries in translation_map_defaults.
Bulk resource export limits concurrent API operations to the configured token_pool_size.
